compiled_state.title: Refactor sprint-next-batch.sh to thin exec wrapper, move impl to ticket-next-batch.sh
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description

Reverse the current delegation direction: move the ~1011-line implementation from sprint-next-batch.sh into ticket-next-batch.sh (replacing its current exec-delegate to sprint-next-batch.sh), and replace sprint-next-batch.sh with a thin exec wrapper that calls the ticket CLI shim.

### Implementation Steps

1. Copy the full implementation body from sprint-next-batch.sh into ticket-next-batch.sh (replacing the current `exec "$SCRIPT_DIR/sprint-next-batch.sh" "$@"` with the actual implementation)
2. Replace sprint-next-batch.sh content with a thin wrapper (~10 lines):
   - shebang + `set -euo pipefail`
   - Locate REPO_ROOT via git
   - `exec "${REPO_ROOT}/.claude/scripts/dso" ticket next-batch "$@"`  # shim-exempt: thin-wrapper shim call
3. Verify ticket-next-batch.sh does NOT reference sprint-next-batch.sh
4. Verify sprint-next-batch.sh does NOT contain .tickets-tracker/ references

### File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh | Modify (replace 1011-line impl with thin exec wrapper) |
| plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-next-batch.sh | Modify (replace 6-line exec-delegate with full implementation) |

### Test Approach
Given: sprint-next-batch.sh is a thin exec wrapper calling ticket next-batch via shim
When: test-sprint-next-batch.sh calls sprint-next-batch.sh with a mock ticket fixture
Then: all output tokens (SKIPPED_*, EPIC:, AVAILABLE_POOL:, BATCH_SIZE:, TASK:), --json schema, and exit codes are identical to before the refactor

Note: test-sprint-next-batch.sh requires NO modification — it tests sprint-next-batch.sh's external contract, which is preserved by routing through ticket-next-batch.sh.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] sprint-next-batch.sh does NOT reference .tickets-tracker/ directly
  Verify: ! grep -q '\.tickets-tracker' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] ticket-next-batch.sh does NOT delegate to sprint-next-batch.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q 'sprint-next-batch' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-next-batch.sh
- [ ] sprint-next-batch.sh remains executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
